sizing_rule.note: Position fraction derived dynamically from geometric mean of historical price ratios (HPRs) and biggest historical loss. Optimal f is not a fixed percentage but calculated from trade sequence. Biggest loss serves as denominator component in optimal f formula.

source_rule_text: Position size is determined by the optimal f value, which is calculated using the geometric mean of historical price ratios (HPRs) and the biggest loss from the trade sequence.
